---
title: "test_daemon_brain.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_daemon_brain.py"
loc: 40
complexity: 3
logic_score: 6.88
style_score: 3.50
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.37
---

## Intent
The `test_daemon_brain.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_daemon, test_process_command_ask_routes_to_cognitive_router, test_execute_sleep_protocol_closes_mimir. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_daemon, test_process_command_ask_routes_to_cognitive_router, test_execute_sleep_protocol_closes_mimir. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [time](file://time)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)

### Exports
- `mock_daemon`
- `test_process_command_ask_routes_to_cognitive_router`
- `test_execute_sleep_protocol_closes_mimir`
